lookbook.heading: AI Lookbook Magazine quality without a shoot
lookbook.description: Generate professional lookbook images and editorial videos from a single text prompt. Dramatically reduce studio shooting costs and time.

tryOn.heading: Virtual Try-On Digital fitting experience
tryOn.description: AI-powered virtual fitting adapts products to each customer's body. Dramatically reduce "wrong size" returns and boost purchase conversions.

video.heading: AI Editorial Video Production powered by AI
video.description: The Louvre, Gunkanjima, Scottish castles. AI-generated editorial films that blur the line between reality and fantasy. Complete promotional video production with AI.

live.heading: LINE Live Commerce Sell live Unified inventory
live.description: Live stream directly on LINE. Product links, inventory sync, payments — all seamless. Sell in real-time on the best channel for Japanese customers. Use your existing LINE Official Account and push-notify followers the moment you go live.

network.heading: Fashion Network Connecting brands and shops
network.description: The moment you subscribe, brands and shops connect. Virtual exhibitions, new collection outreach, sample lending management — VUAL eliminates physical distance and PR complexity.
network.exhibitionDesc: Showcase new collections digitally. Shops nationwide can browse and order online.
network.outreachDesc: AI automatically matches brands with shops. New collection alerts, exhibition invites, and sample requests — all in one flow.
network.orderDesc: Manage exhibition orders centrally on VUAL. Complete the flow from ordering to delivery.
network.prAgentDesc: Sample lending & return tracking, schedule management, barcode label generation. Complete PR operations on VUAL.

allInOne.heading: All-in-One Platform Everything in one place
allInOne.description: Product management, order processing, customer analytics, collections, blog, editorial. No more switching between multiple tools.

founder.name: Sachio Kawasaki
founder.bio: MA Fashion, Central Saint Martins. Balenciaga. Founded and ran his own brand — and through that experience, saw firsthand the operational inefficiencies that technology should have solved long ago. VUAL is a product born from inside the industry.

cta.heading: Build the future of fashion together
cta.description: VUAL empowers both brands and select shops with cutting-edge AI technology. Join the waiting list for early access.

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.body: VUAL for Shopify ("the App") is operated by LUFIS Co., Ltd. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you install and use our App on your Shopify store.

dataCollected.heading: Data We Collect
dataCollected.item1: Store information: Shop domain, store name, and locale settings (provided by Shopify during installation).
dataCollected.item2: Product data: Product titles, descriptions, images, and variant information (accessed via Shopify API to generate lookbook images).
dataCollected.item3: Generated content: AI-generated lookbook images and collection data created through the App.
dataCollected.item4: Customer photos: Photos uploaded by end customers for Virtual Try-On (processed in real-time and not stored permanently on our servers).

purpose.heading: How We Use Your Data
purpose.item1: To generate AI lookbook images using your product photos.
purpose.item2: To provide Virtual Try-On functionality for your store customers.
purpose.item3: To manage your subscription, track credit usage, and provide billing services.

thirdParty.heading: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.body: We use the following third-party services to provide core App functionality:
thirdParty.item1: Google Gemini API: Product images are sent to Google's Gemini API for AI image generation. Google's privacy policy applies to data processed by their services.
thirdParty.item2: Supabase: Subscription and credit usage data is stored in Supabase (hosted on AWS). Data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

retention.heading: Data Retention
retention.body: Store and subscription data is retained while the App is installed. Generated images are stored as Shopify product images within your store — we do not maintain separate copies. Customer photos uploaded for Virtual Try-On are processed in real-time and automatically deleted after processing. Upon App uninstallation, your subscription data is deactivated within 30 days.

customerData.heading: End Customer Data
customerData.body: Photos uploaded by your store customers for Virtual Try-On are used solely for generating the try-on result. These photos are processed in memory and are not stored, logged, or shared. No personally identifiable customer information is collected or retained by the App.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data at any time by contacting us. Upon uninstalling the App, you may request complete deletion of all associated data. We comply with applicable data protection regulations including GDPR and APPI (Act on the Protection of Personal Information, Japan).

security.heading: Data Security
security.body: We implement industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption for all data in transit, encrypted storage at rest, and access controls to protect your data. We regularly review our security practices to ensure the safety of your information.

changes.heading: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated through the App or via email. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or your data, please contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Service — VUAL for Shopify

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By installing or using VUAL for Shopify ("the App"), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please uninstall the App immediately.

service.heading: Service Description
service.body: VUAL for Shopify provides AI-powered lookbook image generation and Virtual Try-On functionality for Shopify stores. The App uses artificial intelligence to generate styled lookbook images from your product photos and allows your customers to virtually try on garments.

credits.heading: Credits and Billing
credits.body: The App operates on a credit-based system. New installations receive 12 free credits. Additional credits are available through monthly subscription plans billed via Shopify. Credits are consumed when generating lookbook images or processing Virtual Try-On requests. Unused monthly credits do not roll over to the next billing cycle. Subscription fees are non-refundable except as required by applicable law.

content.heading: Generated Content
content.body: Images generated through the App are AI-produced and may not perfectly represent actual products. You are responsible for reviewing all generated content before publishing it to your store. VUAL does not guarantee the accuracy, quality, or suitability of AI-generated images for any specific purpose.

ip.heading: Intellectual Property
ip.body: You retain all rights to your original product photos and store content. AI-generated images created through the App are owned by you and may be used freely for commercial purposes. The App itself, including its code, design, and AI models, remains the intellectual property of LUFIS Co., Ltd.

liability.heading: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: The App is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. LUFIS Co., Ltd. shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the App, including but not limited to lost profits, data loss, or business interruption. Our total liability shall not exceed the fees paid by you in the 12 months preceding the claim.

termination.heading: Termination
termination.body: You may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it from your Shopify store. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to the App for violations of these terms, abuse of the service, or non-payment. Upon termination, your remaining credits are forfeited.

governing.heading: Governing Law
governing.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Fukuoka District Court.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:
